title: ochna citrina
intro: Ochna citrina, also known as the bird's eye bush, is a small shrub native to Southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Ochna citrina has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Ochna citrina are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
